title: Vertical hall elements having reduced offset and method of manufacturing thereof
abstract: Vertical Hall elements are disclosed which comprise a substrate (101) of a first conductivity type having a first surface (101a) and a second surface (101b), a well (102) of a second conductivity type disposed in and exposed on both surfaces of the substrate, and at least four terminals, preferably comprising highly doped regions of the second conductivity type, in contact with the well. At least two terminals (1, 2) are arranged on the first surface, and at least two terminals (3, 4) are arranged on the second surface such that one terminal (1) on the first surface and one terminal (4) on the second surface have the same but opposite location in a cross-section orthogonal to the substrate surfaces. Alternatively, an element comprises one central pair of opposite surface terminals, whereas the other two terminals comprise lateral buried doped regions (151a, 151c) connecting to the first surface.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A vertical Hall element, comprising: - a substrate (101) of a first conductivity type having a first surface (10 la) and a second surface (lOlb); - a well (102) being disposed in the substrate (101), the well (102) having a second conductivity type; characterized in that the well (102) is exposed on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101), the vertical Hall element comprising at least two terminals (1, 2) arranged on the first surface (lOla) of the substrate (101) and being in contact with the well (102), and at least two terminals (3, 4) arranged on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) and being in contact with the well (102), wherein the at least two terminals (3, 4) on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) are disposed in an orthogonal projection on the substrate (101) below the at least two terminals (1, 2) on the first surface (lOla) of the substrate (101). 2. The vertical Hall element of claim 1 , - wherein the at least two terminals (1 , 2) on the first surface (10 la) of the substrate (101) comprises a first terminal (1) and a second terminal (2) being arranged next to each other on the first surface (10 la) of the substrate (101), - wherein the at least two terminals (3, 4) on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) comprises a third terminal (3) and a fourth terminal (4) being arranged next to each other on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101), - wherein the fourth terminal (4) is located directly below the first terminal (1) such that a virtual straight line between a center of the first terminal (1) and a center of the fourth terminal (4) is perpendicular to first and second surface (lOla, lOlb) of the substrate (101), - wherein the third terminal (3) is located directly below the second terminal (2) such that a virtual straight line between a center of the second terminal (2) and a center of the third terminal (3) is perpendicular to first and second surface (lOla, lOlb) of the substrate (101). 3. The vertical Hall element of claim 1 or 2, 

 wherein each of the at least two terminals (1, 2) on the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (101) comprises a shallow and highly doped region (103) extending from the first surface (10 la) into the substrate (101), the highly doped region (103) having the second conductivity type. 4. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 1 to 3, comprising: - a dielectric layer (104) being disposed on the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (101), - a wiring (105, ..., 108) being embedded in the dielectric layer (104). 5. The vertical Hall element of claim 4, wherein the at least two terminals (1 , 2) on the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (101) are connected with a first metal layer (106) of the wiring embedded in the dielectric layer (104). 6. The vertical Hall element of claim 4 or 5, comprising: a carrier substrate (201) being bonded to a top surface (l04a) of the dielectric layer (104), wherein the top surface (l04a) of the dielectric layer (104) is opposite to a surface of the dielectric layer disposed on the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (101). 7. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 1 to 6, wherein each of the at least two terminals (3, 4) on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) comprises a shallow and highly doped region (303) extending from the second surface (lOlb) into the substrate (101), the highly doped region (303) having the second conductivity type. 8. The vertical Hall element of claim 7, comprising: - a second dielectric layer (304), - a passivation layer (308), - wherein the second dielectric layer (304) is disposed on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) and the passivation layer (308) is disposed on the dielectric layer (304). 9. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 4 to 8, comprising: 

 a through silicon via (TSV) filled with a conductive filling (305) that provides a vertical conductive path through the substrate (101) for connecting one of the third and fourth terminal (3, 4) to the wiring in the dielectric layer (104). 10. The vertical Hall element of claim 9, wherein the conductive filling (305) of the through silicon via (TSV) is isolated from the substrate (101) by a dielectric liner (306) disposed onto an inner surface of the through silicon via (TSV). 11. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 1 to 10, comprising: a deep trench isolation structure (601) extending from the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (100) to the second surface (lOlb) ofthe substrate so that the well (102) is isolated from the substrate (101) by the deep trench isolation structure (601). 12. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 1 to 11 , wherein the vertical Hall element is configured as a circular vertical Hall element, the well (102) being formed as a ring-shaped well, the vertical Hall element having a plurality of the at least two terminals (1, 2, ..., N) located on the first surface (101 a) ofthe substrate (101) on a first circle and being in contact with the well (102), and a plurality of the at least two terminals (1â, 2â, ..., Nâ) located on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) on a second circle and in contact with the well (102), wherein a respective one ofthe plurality of the at least two terminals (1â, 2â, ..., Nâ) on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) is disposed in an orthogonal projection on the substrate (101) below a respective one of the plurality of the at least two terminals (1, 2, ..., N) on the first surface (lOla) of the substrate (101). 13. The vertical Hall element of claim 12, comprising: two ring-shaped isolation structures (30la, 30lb), the two ring-shaped isolation structures (30la, 30lb) extending from the first surface (lOla) of the substrate (101) to the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) and being concentric with the ring-shaped well (102) so that the well (102) 

 is laterally enclosed by the two ring-shaped isolation structures (30la, 30lb) and isolated from the substrate (101). 14. A Vertical Hall element, comprising: - a substrate (101) of a first conductivity type having a first surface (101 a) and a second surface (lOlb); - a well (102) being disposed in the substrate (101), the well (102) having a second conductivity type; characterized in that the vertical Hall element comprises a first terminal (A), a second terminal (B), a third terminal (C) and a fourth terminal (D), each of the first and third terminal (A, C) comprising a connecting region (15 la, 15 lc), the respective connecting region (151 a, 151 c) providing a connection of the first and second terminal (A, C) to the first surface (10 la) of the substrate, each of the first and third terminal (A, C) being accessed via a doped region (l03a, l03c) extending from the first surface (10 la) of the substrate (101) inside of the doped region (l5la, 151 c), the second terminal (B) being arranged on the first surface (lOla) of the substrate (101), and the fourth terminal (D) being arranged on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate opposite to the second terminal (B). 15. The vertical Hall element of claim 14, - wherein the second terminal (B) comprises a conductive region (l03b) extending from the first surface (10 la) of the substrate (101) in the substrate (101), - wherein the fourth terminal (D) comprises a conductive region (303d) extending from the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101) in the substrate (101), - wherein the fourth terminal (D) is located directly below the second terminal (B) such that a virtual straight line between a center of the conductive region (l03b) of the second terminal (B) and a center of the conductive region (303d) of the fourth terminal (4) is perpendicular to first and second surface (101 a, 101 b) of the substrate (101). 16. The vertical Hall element of claim 14 or 15, comprising: - a dielectric layer (104) being disposed on the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (101), 

 - a carrier (201) being attached to a top surface (l04a) of the dielectric layer (104), wherein the top surface (l04a) of the dielectric layer (104) is opposite to a surface of the dielectric layer disposed on the first surface (lOla) of the substrate (101). 17. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 14 to 16, wherein each of the first and third terminal (A, C) comprises a conductive buried region (l52a, l52c) buried in the well (102), the respective connecting region (15 la, 15 lc) providing a connection of the conductive buried region (l52a, l52c) to the first surface (101 a) of the substrate. 18. The vertical Hall element of claim 17, comprising: - a first doping well (153) extending form the first surface (101 a) of the substrate (101) into the well (102) down to the buried region (l52a) of the first terminal (A), - a second doping well (153) extending form the first surface (lOla) ofthe substrate (101) into the well (102) down to the buried region (l52c) of the third terminal (C). 19. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 14 to 18, - wherein the connecting well (15 la) of the first terminal (A) is surrounded by a first dielectric structure (154), - wherein the connecting well (151 c) of the third terminal (C) is surrounded by a second dielectric structure (154). 20. The vertical Hall element of any of the claims 14 to 19, comprising: - a deep trench isolation structure (301) extending from the first surface (101 a) to the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101), - wherein the well (102) is isolated by the deep trench isolation structure (301) from the substrate (101). 21. A semiconductor device, comprising: - a vertical Hall element of any of the claims 1 to 20, 

 - a circuitry to operate the vertical Hall element, wherein the circuitry is configured as an integrated circuit being formed in the substrate (101). 22. The semiconductor device of claim 21, - wherein the circuitry comprises a bonding pad (309) formed on the second surface (lOlb) of the substrate (101), - wherein the circuitry comprises a trough silicon via (311 ) to provide a connection between the bonding pad (309) and a wiring disposed in dielectric layer (104) on the first surface (10 la) of the substrate (101).
